text: Bhai ko jaydad mein bada hissa mila taaki wo naya business shuru kar sake, aur mujhe bade hone ke naate bola gaya ki main apna share chhod doon taaki khandaan ki izzat bani rahe. Ab divorcee hone ki wajah se log kya kahenge ke darr mein main din-raat bacchon ke liye ghis rahi hoon, kyunki mere paas thakne ka option nahi hai. Poore parivaar ki structural stability mere hi endurance par tiki hai.

Mummy-Papa ne saara batwara bhai ke haq mein kar diya taaki uska future secure rahe, aur mujhse umeed ki jati hai ki main bina shikayat sab handle karun. Economic precarity ke bawajood mujhe bina ruke kaam karte rehna hai taaki bacchon ki school fees aur ghar ke kharche time par jayein. Main afford nahi kar sakti ki main thoda bhi slow padun, yahi meri kismat aur duty hai.

Bhai ko property milne par community exclusion ke darr se main chup rahi aur ab extra shifts karke bacchon ka wellbeing dekh rahi hoon. Main mentally aur physically itni exhaust ho chuki hoon ki lagta hai abhi gir jaungi, par 'cannot afford to stop' wali feeling mujhe har subah utha deti hai. Meri kurbani hi bhai ka rasta saaf karegi aur mere bacchon ko ek behtar kal degi.

Bade hone ki yahi keemat hai ki bhai ko property aur azadi mili, aur mujhe sirf divorced hone ka stigma aur ghar ke saare obligations. Main itni thaki hui hoon ki dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, par mujhe bacchon ki zimmedari aur parivaar ki 'izzat' ke liye endurance dikhani hi hogi. Rukne ka matlab hai bacchon ka bhavishya barbaad hona, isliye mujhe ye duty nibhani hi hai.

Joint family mein property batwara mein mere saath na-insafi hui par bade hone ke naate mujhe ye duty nibhani hai aur mehnat karte rehna hai. Main physically toot chuki hoon par bacchon ki upbringing aur bhai ki settlement ke liye mujhe rukna manzoor nahi. Mera kaam sirf endurance dikhana hai, chahe andar se main kitni bhi akeli aur thaki hui mehsus karun.
